name: solar-monitoring
description: Solar energy monitoring and control dashboard for Fronius inverter with battery

scripts.check-types: npm run check-types -w backend && npm run check-types -w frontend
scripts.dev: lsof -ti:3000,5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.test: npm run check-types && npm run eslint && npm run prettier && npm run test-backend
